name: stackra/enum
purpose: Modern PHP 8.1+ enum system with metadata attributes, invokable cases, translation helpers, and comparison utilities.
capabilities: #[Meta] attribute + Property base for custom metadata
Comparable helpers: is(), isNot(), in(), notIn()
Built-in translation support via label() / trans()
when_to_use: Defining a backed string enum in a package or app — always compose the shipped Enum trait.
when_not_to_use: For plain constant classes without lifecycle behaviour, use raw PHP enums without the trait.
